story.title: Story
story.name: Miguel Espinosa a.k.a. Spin
story.bio_1: DJ and sound curator with over 20 years in the electronic music scene. Specializing in house, deep and progressive, with a focus on the emotional narrative of sound.
story.bio_2: From Bogota, Colombia, Spin has built a career defined by elegant and carefully curated sets, performing at the leading clubs and festivals in the Colombian scene.
story.bio_3: His sound is characterized by deep layers, hypnotic progressions and a selection that connects with the dance floor on a visceral level.
